title: CEC Gyanesh Kumar faces ‘go back’ slogans, shown black flags outside Kalighat temple in Kolkata

summary: “They were trying to take shelter in the border area of Bongaon with the intention of crossing back into Bangladesh when the opportunity arises,” the statement said

title: Case filed against captain of Panama-registered ship over fishing boat collision off Kerala coast
summary: FIR says the trawling boat sank following the accident, causing a loss of about ₹1.5 crore to its owner

title: Schools reopen in Kashmir
summary: Schools, colleges and universities were closed for a week from last Monday after protests erupted across the Valley following Khamenei’s killing

title: West Asia crisis: Pune gas crematoriums shut temporarily
summary: Electric crematoriums and wood-fired facilities will continue to function

title: Around 30 students fall ill with diarrhoea at AIIMS-Mangalagiri, 10 under observation
summary: According to information from the management, the symptoms began on Thursday (March 6) and Friday (March 7) among undergraduate students.

title: Watch: End of chapter: R.N.Ravi’s posture helped the DMK | The Hindu Editorial
summary: The controversial tenure of Governor R.N. Ravi in Tamil Nadu reaches an abrupt conclusion as the Home Ministry orchestrates a gubernatorial reshuffle ahead of crucial elections.
